commands: yarn run openapi-generator-cli generate --git-repo-id=daytona --git-user-id=daytonaio -i apps/daemon/pkg/toolbox/docs/swagger.json -g csharp --additional-properties=packageName=Daytona.ToolboxApiClient,targetFramework=net8.0,nullableReferenceTypes=true,library=httpclient,useOneOfDiscriminatorLookup=true -o {projectRoot}/src
